component.name: Rubric Studio Open
component.summary: Local-first IDE for authoring and testing evaluation rubrics

description.p: Rubric Studio Open authors, tests, calibrates, diffs, and exports criterion-level AI evaluation rubrics locally.
Rubrics stay on disk by default. Provider keys are BYO, and telemetry and crash reporting are opt-in only.
Staged Proofline UI/UX package metadata. No Linux artifact is published or verified.
Initial historical Linux package metadata for Rubric Studio Open distribution.
